addAsset(address,string).details: Cannot add primary asset, reverts if asset already supported

params.asset: Address of the asset to add

disableEmergencyMode().details: Can only be called after emergency delay period

enableEmergencyMode().details: Pauses operations and starts emergency delay timer

getEmergencyStatus().details: Used to check vault status before operations

returns.timeUntilNextAction: Time until next emergency action allowed

params.asset: Address of the asset to get price for

returns.price: Current oracle price (0 if not available)
returns.success: Whether oracle price was successfully fetched

getPrimaryAsset().details: Primary asset cannot be changed after deployment

getSupportedAssets().details: Primary asset is always first in the array

handleDeposit(address,address,uint256).details: Different handling for primary vs secondary assets

params.asset: Address of the asset being deposited

returns._0: success Whether the deposit was successful

handleWithdraw(address,address,uint256).details: Different handling for primary vs secondary assets

params.asset: Address of the asset to withdraw

returns._0: success Whether the withdrawal was successful

params.asset: Address of the asset to check

isPrimaryAsset(address).details: Used to determine asset handling flow

returns._0: bool True if asset is primary asset

removeAsset(address,string).details: Cannot remove primary asset, reverts if asset not supported

params.asset: Address of the asset to remove

unpause().details: Cannot unpause if in emergency mode

withdrawEmergency(address,address,uint25.details: Available in emergency mode only, special handling for primary asset

params.asset: Address of the asset to withdraw

returns._0: success Whether the withdrawal was successful

addAsset(address,string).notice: Adds support for a secondary asset

getOraclePrice(address).notice: Gets the current oracle price for the asset if available

getSupportedAssets().notice: Gets complete list of supported assets

handleDeposit(address,address,uint256).notice: Handles deposit of any supported asset

handleWithdraw(address,address,uint256).notice: Handles withdrawal of any supported asset

isPrimaryAsset(address).notice: Checks if an asset is the primary asset

removeAsset(address,string).notice: Removes support for a secondary asset

withdrawEmergency(address,address,uint25.notice: Executes emergency withdrawal for any supported asset
